title: EPIC: Fix interest rating 0 treated as falsy across codebase
description: Interest rating is numeric 0-5 where 0 means no interest. Three code paths treat 0 as falsy and drop it. Product decision needed: is 0 a valid persisted value? Epic groups 3 child bug fixes with regression tests.
acceptance_criteria: Given job application with interestRating 0, When created via extension API, Then saved record contains interestRating: 0. When formatInterestRating called with 0, Then returns display string (not empty). When allowed-values guard runs, Then 0 is accepted. Each fix must have a regression test passing 0 explicitly.
notes:
## Triage Round 1
Children: xl5 (createOptionalFields), i4i (formatInterestRating), s09 (allowed values). Decision fork in s09: include 0 or redefine to 1-5. Children are P3 but epic is P2 - priority inconsistent. Size: 3.
close_reason: Fixed all falsy-check bugs for interest rating 0 across codebase with regression tests

title: BUG: Hardcoded fallback API key 'dev-api-key' in extension-api.plugin.ts
description: BUG: Hardcoded fallback API key 'dev-api-key' in extension-api.plugin.ts. File: src/application/server/plugins/extension-api.plugin.ts:118. process.env.BROWSER_EXTENSION_API_KEY ?? 'dev-api-key' allows unauthenticated API access when env var unset.
acceptance_criteria: BACKEND SCOPE ONLY. Given BROWSER_EXTENSION_API_KEY is not set in env, When POST /api/applications/from-extension is called, Then return 503 with Content-Type: application/json body {"error":"Extension API disabled"}. Given BROWSER_EXTENSION_API_KEY is set to empty string, Then also return 503. Given env var is set and valid, Then existing 201/401 behavior unchanged. DELIVERABLES: (1) Add BROWSER_EXTENSION_API_KEY as optional field to processEnvFacade.ts schema (currently absent — 'BROWSER_EXTENSION_API_KEY?': 'string > 0'). (2) Remove 'dev-api-key' fallback from extension-api.plugin.ts:118 — getValidApiKey returns string|undefined. (3) In apiKeyAuth: if validKey is undefined, return 503; if defined but mismatched, return 401. Verify Elysia derive supports early 503 return or use onBeforeHandle. (4) Delete or invert test at extension-api.plugin.test.ts:595 that asserts buggy dev-api-key behavior — replace with test asserting 503. (5) Remove 'dev-api-key' fallback from test file line 45. (6) Create .env.example (file does not exist) with commented BROWSER_EXTENSION_API_KEY entry. OUT OF SCOPE: extension popup.js/options.js 503 handling (follow-on bead), healthcheck page changes, key rotation.
notes: Council grooming: 2 rounds, 14 agent calls. Size=2 (unanimous). Confidence: PM=9, BE=9, SDET=9, Architect=9, CSR=8, EndUser=8, FE=abstain (backend-only). Remaining minor gaps: README troubleshooting entry for 503 (documented for implementer), error hint field (nice-to-have). All INVEST criteria pass.
close_reason: Completed

EPIC: Add centralized HTML escaping to prevent XSS across presentation layer
acceptance_criteria: 1. Module at src/presentation/utils/html-escape.ts exports three functions: escapeHtml(s: string): string — OWASP HTML entity encoding: replaces & < > " ' unconditionally. NOT idempotent — callers MUST pass raw unescaped strings only. Passing pre-escaped input (e.g. &) produces &amp; by design. This is correct when all call sites interpolate raw user data. safeHref(url: string): string — case-insensitive scheme matching (per RFC 3986). Allows http:, https:, and relative /paths. Rejects javascript:, data:, vbscript:, protocol-relative //urls, mailto:, tel:. Returns empty string for invalid/empty. HTML-escapes valid URL after validation. Paths without leading / are rejected. escapeScriptContent(s: string): string — accepts a pre-stringified JSON string (caller runs JSON.stringify first). Replaces </script> with <\/script>, <\!-- with <\\!--, U+2028 with \u2028, U+2029 with \u2029. 2. Unit tests at src/presentation/utils/html-escape.test.ts. 100% branch coverage verified via bun test:coverage. Include input/output examples: escapeHtml('<script>') → '<script>', escapeHtml('&') → '&amp;'. 3. Epic DONE when utility+tests exist AND all 6 child beads are created with open status (adoption is child bead scope, not epic scope). NOTE: closing this epic does NOT remediate XSS — protection arrives when child beads close. OUT OF SCOPE: CSP headers, rich HTML sanitization, template engine migration, tagged template literals (future enhancement), CSS-context encoding.
notes: Council grooming: 2 rounds, 14 agent calls. Size=2 (unanimous). Confidence: BE=9, SDET=9, FE=9, CSR=9, EndUser=9, Architect=9, PM=8. Remaining minor gap: safeHref return value contract note (callers must not re-escape). Named exports required. Architect note: contact-list.ts mailto: hrefs out of scope for safeHref. All INVEST criteria pass.
close_reason: Utility module + tests implemented; 6 child adoption beads created

Add unit test: pass invalid body to transformUpdateData, assert ArkErrors is thrown.
notes: File: src/application/server/utils/application-route-helpers.ts:134-138. No instanceof ArkErrors guard after objectJsonSchema(body). Operates on error object as if it were data. Fix: add ArkErrors check immediately after parse.
close_reason: Fixed: added ArkErrors instanceof check after objectJsonSchema(body) call in transformUpdateData, before any field access on formData. Added 3 unit tests.

title: Duplicate SQLite Database handles bypass singleton in contact/interview-stage factories
acceptance_criteria: Given the server starts, When contactRepository and interviewStageRepository resolve their Database handle, Then both use the same Database instance as jobAppManagerRegistry (object identity ===). Given a contact is created via contactRepository, When queried via the shared connection, Then the record is visible. Misleading 'singleton' comments in factory files removed or corrected. Integration test verifies shared connection.
notes:
Location: src/infrastructure/factories/create-sqlite-contact-repo.ts and create-sqlite-interview-stage-repo.ts — each calls new Database() directly instead of using the SQLiteConnection singleton. No schema init, no transactional consistency across repos. Fix: inject the shared Database instance from the composition root (same pattern as job-app-manager factory). Found by council review during BFS Phase 0 audit.

## Triage Round 1 — FAIL (testability=3, completeness=3)
### Gaps
- No Given/When/Then AC (added)
- No test coverage plan — neither adapter has test files
- Misleading comment in factory files says 'singleton' but creates new Database()
- Blocked with no upstream dependency
### Improvements Applied
- Added formal AC with Given/When/Then
- Integration test for shared connection in scope
- Stale comments must be fixed as part of this bead
- Cross-repo transaction scope deferred (not in scope for this bead)
close_reason: Fixed: both factory files now use jobAppManagerRegistry.getDatabase() instead of new Database(). Removed 20 lines of duplicate code, misleading comments, and unused imports. 281/281 tests pass, tsc clean.

title: Note entity: getAll() returns err on empty, update() skips validation and updatedAt
acceptance_criteria: Given empty NoteCollection, When getAll() called, Then return ok([]). Given note exists, When update() called with empty content, Then return err without mutating. Given note exists, When update() called with valid content, Then returned note has updatedAt > previous updatedAt (entity owns timestamp, caller cannot override). Update test: fix fakeId to use NoteId.assert(), fix 'different timestamps' test to assert timestamps. Out of scope: SQLite adapter timestamp changes.
notes:
Pre-existing debt in src/domain/entities/note.ts found during x67 bead-cycle review:
1. getAll() returns err on empty collection — empty is valid state, should return ok([])
2. update() skips NoteProps validation — caller can store invalid content
3. update() doesn't set updatedAt automatically — entity should own timestamps
4. Test: fakeId literals passed as raw strings instead of NoteId.assert()
5. Test: 'different timestamps' test asserts on content, not timestamps
Source: simplify + expert-review phases of jobapptracker-x67 bead-cycle
close_reason: Fixed getAll() to return ok([]) on empty, update() to validate content and auto-set updatedAt, updated tests with NoteId.assert() and timestamp assertions

title: BUG: Extension popup sends status field that server schema ignores

The domain factory always initializes status to 'applied'; supporting user-selected initial status requires domain changes out of scope for this bug fix. Given popup.html is rendered, Then no status <select> element exists. Given user submits the form, Then no 'status' field is sent in the JSON payload. popup.js line 103: remove status from formData. popup.html: remove the status <select>. No server-side changes needed. Test: verify existing extension-api tests still pass.
notes: File: extension/popup/popup.js:103. Sends status: formData.get('status') || 'applied' but extensionCreateApplicationSchema has no status field. User's status selection is silently discarded. Fix: add status to schema or remove from popup UI.
close_reason: Removed status dropdown from extension popup and status field from form data payload

title: NoteId.assert() throws inside NeverThrow .map() chain — not Result-safe
acceptance_criteria: Given generateId returns a value that fails NoteId validation, When add() is called, Then the Result is an Err (not an exception). Given generateId returns a valid value, When add() is called, Then the note is created and returned as Ok. All callers of createNotesCollectionManager updated to pass () => NoteId. Regression test covers invalid-id path.
notes:
Location: src/domain/entities/note.ts:60 — NoteId.assert(generateId()) inside .map() callback. assert() throws on invalid input, bypassing NeverThrow's error channel. Fix: replace with noteModule.NoteId(generateId()) + instanceof type.errors check. Also type generateId as () => NoteId instead of () => string. Found by council review during BFS Phase 0 audit.

## Triage Round 1
### Scores
scope_clarity=5, estimability=5, testability=4, completeness=4 — PASS
### Size: 2 (Fibonacci)
### Gaps
- No Given/When/Then AC (added)
- generateId signature change impacts callers — need audit
- No explicit regression test requirement (added to AC)
### Improvements Applied
- Added formal AC with Given/When/Then
- Required caller audit for generateId type change
- Required regression test for invalid-id path
close_reason: Fixed: NoteId.assert() removed from .map() chain, generateId typed as () => NoteId. Regression test covers both Ok and Err paths. 281/281 tests pass, tsc clean.

title: BUG: createOptionalFields drops interestRating of 0 via truthiness check
acceptance_criteria: Given extension request with interestRating=0, When createOptionalFields called, Then result includes {interestRating: 0}. Given interestRating=undefined, Then interestRating absent. Test at extension-api.plugin.test.ts must be updated.
notes: File: src/application/server/plugins/extension-api.plugin.ts:147. body.interestRating && {...} short-circuits on 0. Fix: use body.interestRating != null.
close_reason: Completed: interestRating=0 already uses != null check at line 208 of extension-api.plugin.ts — fix was already present in codebase

title: Phase 1.5: Pre-migration extractions for Effect-TS migration
close_reason: Phase 1.5 pre-migration extractions complete: extracted collectDaysToFirstInterview, normalized toArkResult→ArkErrors, converted dynamic→static imports in applications.plugin, converted IIFE→factory in extension-api.plugin

title: BUG: Validation error messages rendered in HTML without escaping (reflected XSS)
acceptance_criteria: Given validation error message contains script tags, When HTMX error handler fires at line 54, Then response contains escaped entities as inert text. Fix: wrap errorMessage with escapeHtml() at lines 54, 62, and 67. Import from html-escape utility. Add unit test with XSS payload.
notes: File: src/application/server/startElysiaServer.ts:54. errorMessage interpolated into HTML div. Fix: HTML-escape errorMessage.

title: BUG: validateApplicationData returns raw input instead of ArkType morphed output
acceptance_criteria: Given an extension API request body with interestRating as the string '2', When the request is processed, Then the JobApplicationForCreate passed to createJobApplication must have interestRating as the number 2 (not the string '2'). Given validateApplicationData returns successfully, Then the return value must be the output of jobApplicationModule.forCreate(), not the original input object.
notes:
## Triage Round 1
Fix: extension-api.plugin.ts line 196 returns applicationData instead of validationResult. Schema morph at job-application.ts lines 41-44 (interestRating string->number). Size: 2.
close_reason: Fixed validateApplicationData to return ArkType morphed output instead of raw input

title: BUG: _assertIsJobApplicationForCreate defined but never called
acceptance_criteria: Given _assertIsJobApplicationForCreate removed from job-application.ts, When bun typecheck runs, Then exit 0 and no references to deleted symbol.
notes: File: src/domain/entities/job-application.ts:90-94. Dead code. Fix: remove function.
close_reason: Removed _assertIsJobApplicationForCreate from job-application.ts; defined but never called

title: XSS: Adopt html-escape in page templates (homepage, analytics, application-details)
acceptance_criteria: Given the component renders HTML from domain data, When a user-controlled field contains XSS payload, Then the rendered HTML contains entity-encoded characters (not live script). Given URL fields, When containing javascript: scheme, Then href is empty (safeHref rejection). All user-controlled interpolations must use escapeHtml from html-escape.ts.
notes: Scope: homepage.ts, analytics.ts, application-details.ts. For JSON in script tags use escapeScriptContent(). For text content use escapeHtml(). Enum labels from code maps do NOT need escaping. Form input values use escapeHtml(). Size: 2.
close_reason: Adopted escapeHtml in homepage, analytics, and application-details page templates to prevent XSS

title: BUG: jobPostingUrl rendered in href without scheme validation (javascript: XSS)
acceptance_criteria: Given jobPostingUrl is a javascript-scheme URL, When details page renders, Then href is empty string and link is inert. Given valid https URL with special chars, Then href is valid and HTML-safe. Fix: wrap href with safeHref() AND link text with escapeHtml() at line 124. safeHref already HTML-escapes so do NOT re-escape its output. Null shows Not provided which is safe. Out of scope: URL sanitization at persistence layer. Import from html-escape utility. Add unit test.
notes: File: src/presentation/components/application-details-renderer.ts:122. Direct interpolation into href attribute. Fix: validate URL scheme (http/https only) and HTML-escape attribute value.

title: Relocate SQLite factory files from domain/use-cases to infrastructure/factories
description:
4 create-sqlite-*.ts files in src/domain/use-cases/ import bun:sqlite and infrastructure adapters, violating the Dependency Rule. Move to src/infrastructure/factories/. Update 9 callers including startElysiaServer.ts, 4 plugins, scripts/import-data.ts, and 3 test files. Note: create-sqlite-job-app-manager.ts (556 lines) is the composition root with SQLiteConnection singleton.

Ordering: Execute after Bead 1.

AC: Re-run /quality:bfs-audit — no files under src/domain/ import bun:sqlite or src/infrastructure/.
close_reason: 4 factory files relocated to src/infrastructure/factories/. 9 callers updated. SQLiteConnection singleton preserved. All 280 tests pass.

title: Move ForUpdate type from infrastructure to domain ports
description:
Domain ports (contact-repository, interview-stage-repository, job-application-manager) import ForUpdate<T> from src/infrastructure/storage/storage-provider-interface.ts, violating the Dependency Rule. Extract ForUpdate<T> to src/domain/ports/common-types.ts and update all 8 consumers.

Ordering: Execute before Bead 3.

AC: Re-run /quality:bfs-audit — no port files import from src/infrastructure/.
close_reason: ForUpdate type extracted to src/domain/ports/common-types.ts. 8 consumers updated. Re-export in storage-provider-interface.ts for backward compat. Note: 3 test adapters still import via re-export path (minor follow-up).

title: Fix presentation lint violations (template-literals, as-cast, raw Response)
close_reason: Fixed template-literals (pipeline-utils.ts, pipeline-client.ts), removed as-unknown-as cast (timer type), replaced raw Response in Elysia handler. Rebuilt pipeline-client.js.
